title: Operation
description: Represents a long-running operation that is the result of a network API call. Many Resource Manager operations are asynchronous and return an Operation that can be polled for status.

name.description: The server-assigned name, which is only unique within the same service. Used to poll for the operation status.

metadata.description: Service-specific metadata associated with the operation.

done.description: If true, the operation is complete and either error or response is available.

response.description: The normal response of the operation. Contains the result on success.
